items.name: Mona Azami
items.snippet: Hi doctor, I had my ApoB test done yesterday. Should I send the results through the app?

items.name: Felix Petrov
items.snippet: I have been experiencing some dizziness after the new supplement. Is that expected?

items.name: Sara Lindqvist
items.snippet: Can we reschedule my follow-up to next Thursday instead?

items.name: Omar Hadid
items.snippet: My sleep tracker shows improvement this week. Wanted to share the data with you.
